title: Surgeon Vacancy at Zydus Lifesciences - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Zydus Lifesciences - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Zydus Lifesciences has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zydus Lifesciences:
Zydus Lifesciences is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zydus Lifesciences!
